playbook.intent: Sprint planning chaos -> committable plan with >=0.85 commitment-to-completion ratio over rolling 4 sprints.
playbook.scope: PM runs sprint planning across an Agile team. This playbook embeds an AI assistant in the loop: pre-grooming readiness check, observed-capacity calculation, must-vs-stretch split, and predictive risk callouts. Done when the rolling 4-sprint commitment-to-completion ratio holds >=0.85.

success-criteria.criterion: Definition-of-Ready check completed for every committed item
Observed (not nominal) capacity used in commitment math
Must vs stretch split visible in the plan

stage.name: Pre-flight readiness
stage.intent: No item enters planning if it is not Ready.

tasks.task: Run an automated DoR check on candidate items
Flag items missing acceptance criteria or unsized
Push unready items back to refinement

outputs.output: List of Ready items only, with confidence scores

stage.decision-gate: Advance only with all candidate items marked Ready.

stage.name: Observed capacity
stage.intent: Plan against the team you actually have, not the team on paper.

tasks.task: Calculate effective capacity using last 4 sprints' completion ratio

outputs.output: Effective capacity number for the sprint

stage.decision-gate: Advance with one numeric capacity figure everyone agreed to.

stage.name: Must vs stretch
stage.intent: Separate what we will finish from what we hope to.

tasks.task: Define the Must set that fits within 70-80% of capacity
Define a Stretch set for the remaining 20-30%
Mark each item must/stretch explicitly in the tracker

stage.decision-gate: Advance when the team commits to Must out loud.

stage.name: AI risk callouts
stage.intent: Surface predictable failure modes before commit.

tasks.task: Run AI risk scan over commit set
Flag dependency conflicts, sizing outliers, and capacity hotspots
Drop or de-risk items the team cannot defend

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when all high-severity risks are accepted or mitigated.

stage.name: Commit + log
stage.intent: Record commitments so retros can compare reality.

tasks.task: Lock the sprint commit in the tracker
Append commit set to the predictive analytics log

stage.decision-gate: Done when commitment is locked and the log is updated.

extra.value: [Using nominal capacity from FTE math -> chronic over-commit, Letting unready items into planning to fill slots -> mid-sprint thrash, Skipping must/stretch split -> retro cannot tell what counts as failure]
['Did every committed item pass DoR?', 'Did we plan against observed, not nominal, capacity?', 'Is the commitment-to-completion ratio trending toward 0.85?']

{human: faion get-content ai-assisted-sprint-planning-with-capacity-reality-check --format md, agent: faion get-content ai-assisted-sprint-planning-with-capacity-reality-check --format context, json: faion get-content ai-assisted-sprint-planning-with-capacity-reality-check --format json}
[{version: 1.0.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial draft from F-059-063 chunk-05.}]
